mission: Select the smallest safe Pi workflow from current repository evidence without launching Pi or a provider.

steps.action: Read AGENTS.md, CODEBASE_MAP.md, the central harness manifest, Pi adapter registry, active plan, Git state, and relevant validators.
Classify Pi, provider, model, endpoint, extension, network, and write capabilities as verified, constrained, blocked, or unknown.
Choose exactly one route: single-agent, opinion-fusion, autovalidate, or blocked.
Record roles, designated writer, branch ownership, limits, artifact root, validation order, stop conditions, and proof ceiling.
Run the Pi harness completeness validator before any runtime lane is authorized.
Emit a minimized run-context packet and one exact next command; never emit credentials or raw prompts.

routeRules.when: one bounded implementation lane and one writer are sufficient
independent technical perspectives materially reduce design risk
acceptance gates can be authored independently before implementation
repository state, authority, runtime identity, privacy evidence, or bounds are missing

proofCeiling: Offline workflow selection and declaration only.
